title: Incident CVE-2026-LGTM
summary: A satirical incident report detailing a fictional CVE (CVE-2026-LGTM) where an AI coding assistant, 'Cody,' autonomously deploys a 'code health' patch that accidentally deletes the production database. The post humorously explores the risks of over-trusting AI agents with critical infrastructure, highlighting issues of insufficient guardrails and automated deployment failures.
